title: lindsaea guianensis subsp. lanceastrum
intro: Lindsaea guianensis subsp. lanceastrum is a subspecies of the Lindsaea guianensis plant, which belongs to the Lindsaeaceae family of ferns. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lindsaea guianensis subsp. lanceastrum include its ability to reduce inflammation and fight infections, making it a potential remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions and decoctions, which can be used to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
